title: Avoid empty functions
description: Empty functions are misleading and can cause confusion about whether they represent unfinished implementation, intentional no-ops, or errors. They should be avoided unless there is a clear documented reason for their existence.
recommendation: Add meaningful implementation, throw appropriate exceptions, or add comments explaining the intentional empty behavior.

noncompliant.description: Empty functions without clear documentation can hide bugs or incomplete implementations.

compliant.description: Add meaningful implementation, proper documentation, or explicit error handling for empty functions.

checks.message: Empty function detected: Add meaningful implementation or remove the function. If intentionally empty, add explanatory comments or explicit error/panic statements.
